zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Hattam於從1538年1月11日到1539年1月10日出生在英國艾可傑爾姆斯福德時，她的父親Robert Hattam24歲，母親Anne Hattam29歲。她於1558年2月26日與Isaac George在英國英格蘭貝德福爾卡丁頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1592年在英國英格蘭艾可蕾托 也爾達哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Hattam于从1538年1月11日到1539年1月10日出生在英国艾可傑爾姆斯福德时，她的父亲Robert Hattam24岁，母亲Anne Hattam29岁。她于1558年2月26日与Isaac George在英国英格兰貝德福爾卡丁頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1592年在英国英格兰艾可蕾托 也爾達哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Hattam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: unexplained. This was formerly a fairly widespread name. There may be some connection with Hotham (ER Yorks), which is recorded as Hothom in 1285 and also appears rarely in surnames as Hothom and Hothon and commonly as Hotham ; or with ‘lands … called Hattom Bakelowe’ in Brewood (Staffs), 1588 in Staffs Archives . In Cornwall, possibly related to Hotten .

variants.name: Staffs Archives
meanings: English: unexplained. This was formerly a fairly widespread name. There may be some connection with Hotham (ER Yorks), which is recorded as Hothom in 1285 and also appears rarely in surnames as Hothom and Hothon and commonly as Hotham ; or with ‘lands … called Hattom Bakelowe’ in Brewood (Staffs), 1588 in Staffs Archives . In Cornwall, possibly related to Hotten .

variants.name: Hotham
meanings: English (East Yorkshire): habitational name usually from Hotham (East Yorkshire), but occasionally perhaps also from Holtham in Legsby (Lincolnshire). The East Yorkshire placename may derive from Old English hōdum, dative plural form of hōd ‘shelter’, while the origin of the Lincolnshire placename is uncertain. Compare Holtham .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Hattam was born from 11 January 1538 to 10 January 1539, in Chelmsford, Essex, England, her father, Robert Hattam, was 24 and her mother, Anne Hattam, was 29. She married Isaac George on 26 February 1558, in Caddington, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1592, in Little Yeldham, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Hattam est née du 11 janvier 1538 au 10 janvier 1539, à Chelmsford, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Robert Hattam, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Hattam, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Isaac George le 26 février 1558, à Caddington, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1592, à Little Yeldham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Hattamがから1538年1月11日まで1539年1月10日にイギリスエセックスチェルムスフォードで生まれた時，父Robert Hattamは24歳，母Anne Hattamは29歳であった。1558年2月26日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアカッドイントンでIsaac Georgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1592年にイギリスイギリスエセックスリットル イエルドハムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Hattam(이)가 1538년 1월 11일부터 1539년 1월 10일까지 영국 에세스 헬스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Hattam(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Hattam(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1558년 2월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 카딩턴에서 Isaac George(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 리틀 옐드함에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Hattam родилась с 11 января 1538 по 10 января 1539 в местности челмсфорд, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Hattam было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Hattam, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Isaac George 26 февраля 1558 г. в местности каддингтон, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1592 г. в местности литл иелдхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
